scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api,worker "bun run --filter @struct/web dev" "bun run --filter @struct/api dev" "bun run --filter @struct/worker dev"
scripts.dev:stop: lsof -t -i:3000 -i:3001 -i:3002 | xargs kill 2>/dev/null; docker compose down
scripts.build: bun run --filter @struct/web build && bun run --filter @struct/api build && bun run --filter @struct/worker build
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit --project tsconfig.base.json && tsc --noEmit --project apps/web/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit --project apps/api/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit --project apps/worker/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit --project packages/domain/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit --project packages/persistence/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit --project packages/source-storage/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit --project packages/ingestion/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit --project packages/retrieval/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit --project packages/research-engine/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit --project packages/fred-workflows/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit --project packages/observability/tsconfig.json
scripts.lint:imports: dependency-cruiser --config dependency-cruiser.config.mjs apps packages && bun run scripts/boundary-check.ts apps packages
